byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390295249265888318","book_info":{"abstract":"（无节操万人迷，强制爱，ooc私设严重，请勿考究）
现代娇软美人云窈窈携带金手指王者系统，穿影视剧中崩剧情，无节操万人迷，满满的都是私设，请勿考究哦","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e6000bf1b22ffa8e085816d7a05d38bd","author":"木木木子李呢","author_id":"","book_id":"7390295249265888318","book_name":"综影视：娇软美人在线崩剧情","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7392437197380520985","read_count":"54582","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1997881"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"1623","tags":"快穿,古代言情,异世穿越,系统,二次元,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bd3f50f9fa44251d646599c9c05566e9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779305538&x-signature=jJIJSYkWPbaKEE8ruV2eJKrT1wE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"388"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220332181CFDA3056785214F81FD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":934,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31990,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7310},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7565903157022966552","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主手段越来越厉害了，明明坐拥广大后宫，却每次表现的都是被强迫的，男女主的互动跟拉扯，真的好有意思。女主真的每次都在逃避小黑屋的路上，逃不过就跑路。越来越有趣了。就是错别字和错序的词太多了。女主成仙后变海王了，原来是假装被动被追求，现在开始主动招惹，一下子好几个，完全开放式了。原来喜欢宅着打游戏，现在变成喜欢四处跑，改变好大，有点不太习惯，男主的人设也越来越阴暗病娇了，还蛮带感的，就是女主这几篇人设都有点差不多，新鲜感少了好多。后面又好起来了，不过女主好色这个，没有人设限制的时候，越来越不遮掩了。作者重新修文了，改了好多，读起来一点都不流畅，内容也变得好乱，之前没有看过原文的话，现在看的话会觉得莫名其妙，前言不搭后语。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761575590,"group_id":"7390295249265888318","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2203055290321964"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390295249265888318","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1383"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读65小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":233531,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7396564609695793944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢的一篇文，就是平常不爱看玄幻和仙侠文，所以跳过了几个，感觉好可惜。女主任务扮演女配，但只要符合几个关键词就可以了，而且本身也不用承担原主的愿望或者是仇恨，所以比较自由。而且系统也不是什么二五仔，一切以女主力为前提，喜欢跟女主一块玩双排。想着办法给女主开挂。女主本身性格比较淡漠，万事不挂心，只要能让他玩游戏保证生活质量，其他一切都OK。且长相气质都是天花板级别的，大部分男主基本上都是一见钟情，而且都有点病娇在身上。就是几个宫斗文男主确实有点狗，不过也有女主不太上心的缘故，即使这样，女主想要的也都能得到。人物互动有时候也好搞笑，没有什么太大的雷点，真的很好看。","text_exts":[{"e":199,"s":195,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774121538214F81FD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227396564609695793944%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227390295249265888318%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722150914,"group_id":"7390295249265888318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8wiBV6FhB8GSvzbDThxAAUkLRxCREt59CgYUDfRcEip","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e1ad106b9e28490b82bd37782b756c58~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708864&x-signature=loWIdoBvAjJhGO6lKEwPUccev2M%3D","user_id":"2203055290321964","user_name":"芋头太阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2203055290321964","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390295249265888318","book_info":{"abstract":"（无节操万人迷，强制爱，ooc私设严重，请勿考究）
